hero.title: Digital products that{br}<blue>work for you,</blue> <blue>end‑to‑end</blue>
hero.subtitle: We design and build web services and mobile apps with unique design, fluid motion and AI algorithms that automate routine tasks and attract more customers.

pain.title: Why most digital projects <muted>end in disappointment</muted>
pain.card1Desc: Projects drag on 2–3× longer than agreed, costs balloon, and the final product never matches the original vision.
pain.card2Desc: Template‑based interfaces disappear in a crowded market. Users leave for whoever looks and feels more trustworthy.
pain.card3Desc: Teams spend hours on tasks algorithms handle in seconds. Competitors are already ahead.
pain.card4Desc: Code written so only the author understands it. You’re held hostage by their schedule, mood and rates.
pain.card5Desc: You have a site, you have an app — still no sales. Because nobody thought about the user journey and metrics.
pain.card6Desc: Adding one feature becomes a full project. The architecture wasn’t built to grow — and you find that out at the worst moment.

solution.title: A product that <muted>works for you,</muted> not against you
solution.desc: We don’t just write code — we design business logic, build a design system and embed AI exactly where it delivers a measurable result.
solution.check1: Fixed scope, budget and timeline in the contract
solution.check2: Design tailored to your audience, not a template
solution.check3: AI modules that save 20+ hours per week
solution.check4: Clean, scalable code with full documentation
solution.check6: Full IP transfer — code, design, docs are yours
solution.feat1Desc: MVP in 4–8 weeks. Iterative delivery — you see working software from sprint one.
solution.feat2Desc: Every screen is designed around a specific user action. We track metrics, not just mockups.
solution.feat3Desc: Personalisation, automated funnels, predictive analytics — shipped in production, not just in a slide deck.
solution.feat4Desc: All code, design and documentation belongs to you. No hidden ties to our infrastructure.

services.title: What we <muted>build</muted>
services.svc1Desc: SaaS platforms, marketplaces, corporate portals and complex web apps — from architecture to production.
services.svc2Desc: iOS and Android — native or cross‑platform. Fluid animations and seamless integrations with any third‑party service.
services.svc3Desc: Chatbots, recommendation engines, predictive analytics, auto‑generated content — embedded directly in your product.
services.svc4Desc: Design systems, animated interfaces and motion graphics that make your product genuinely unforgettable.
services.svc5Desc: CRM, ERP, payment gateways, messengers, analytics — any integration without the usual pain and middlemen.
services.svc6Desc: A fast, compelling product to validate a hypothesis or pitch investors — focus on speed and presentation quality.

process.title: A transparent process <muted>with no surprises</muted>
process.note: We work in two‑week sprints. You can adjust priorities at any point and always see the product live — not just in reports.
process.step1Desc: We study your business, audience and competitors. Define goals, metrics and tech requirements. Result: a clear spec with no grey areas.
process.step2Desc: User journey maps, interactive prototype and a bespoke design system. Every screen is signed off before development starts.
process.step3Desc: Two‑week sprints with a live demo. You see a working product at each stage — not only at the end.
process.step4Desc: QA, deployment, team training. After launch: 6 months of warranty support. We stay close until the product is stable and growing.

caseModal.discussFree: Let’s discuss your project for free

rushhour.title: Rush Hour
rushhour.subtitle: Web platform for buying, renting and investing in Dubai real estate — interactive map, 2,500+ listings, developer price comparison and ROI analytics.
rushhour.challengeTitle: — A platform for the Dubai real estate market
rushhour.challengeText: The client needed a modern web platform covering all UAE real estate segments: buying, renting, investing and new developments. Key requirements included a map‑based search, advanced filters (location, property type, price, ROI, bedrooms, sale status) and "our price vs developer price" comparison showing discounts up to 25%.
rushhour.solutionTitle: — Full‑featured platform with map, filters & analytics
rushhour.solutionText: Built a web platform with an interactive Dubai map showing properties, a filtering system with 10+ parameters, project and lot catalogs with photo galleries, ROI indicators, and payment plan details. Integrated WhatsApp for instant inquiries and built an admin panel for listing management.
rushhour.resultText: Rush Hour is live in production, helping buyers and investors find the best deals on the Dubai real estate market with transparent price comparisons and ROI analytics.

vikings.title: BC Vikings
vikings.subtitle: Mobile app for managing a youth basketball school — gamification, attendance tracking and training schedule management.
vikings.challengeText: Stepan, founder of the "Vikings" youth basketball school, wanted to take his school to the next level with digital solutions. The goal was to build an iOS/Android app that boosts player motivation through gamification, automates attendance tracking, and simplifies schedule management.
vikings.solutionTitle: — Prototype in 5 days, MVP in 8 weeks
vikings.solutionText: Built an interactive web prototype in 5 days so the client could test key scenarios before development. Chose Flutter for a single codebase across iOS & Android — faster and more cost‑effective. Development ran in sprints: auth & profiles, scheduling & attendance, gamification (rankings, achievements), and final polish. Added personal coach dashboards, role‑based access control, and mobile attendance marking.
vikings.resultTitle: — Published to App Store on the first attempt
vikings.resultText: The app passed Apple review on the first submission. The client was so satisfied that he added extra features and increased the budget. We prepared all store listing materials and assisted with developer account payment.

box4kids.title: Box4Kids
box4kids.subtitle: Toy subscription box service for the Uzbekistan market — full cycle from frontend to payment system integration.
box4kids.challengeTitle: — Build a toy rental service from scratch
box4kids.challengeText: Uzbekistani entrepreneurs came with an ambitious idea — a toy rental service. Instead of buying expensive toys that kids quickly lose interest in, parents subscribe to a toy box refreshed every 2 weeks. UI/UX was designed by the client’s team in Figma, with a product manager based in Spain.
box4kids.solutionTitle: — Frontend, Backend API, DevOps & payment integrations
box4kids.solutionText: In the first month we built a fully responsive web app, Backend API, and set up DevOps infrastructure. Designed the payment module from scratch when the designer hadn’t completed it. Integrated two Uzbek payment systems (Click & Payme) — docs were incomplete and outdated, requiring hours of communication with their support. Also built an advertising landing page and admin panel.
box4kids.resultText: The service launched successfully with 100+ parents joining the platform. The client was happy with both the landing page and the web app. Weekly reports and a transparent process gave the client full visibility into development progress.

liberandum.title: Liberandum
liberandum.subtitle: Web platform for cryptocurrency tracking — real‑time prices, charts, market capitalisation and detailed analytics for every coin.
liberandum.challengeText: The client needed a web platform for monitoring the crypto market: real‑time prices, market cap, charts, and detailed information for each cryptocurrency in a clean, modern interface.
liberandum.solutionTitle: — Modern web platform with real‑time data
liberandum.solutionText: Built a web app with crypto exchange API integrations, interactive price charts, detailed coin pages with market statistics, and responsive design for all devices.
liberandum.resultText: Liberandum was successfully launched and provides users with real‑time crypto market data.
